sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrayFold (numbers Array(Int64)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT arrayFold(acc, x -> acc + x, numbers, 0) AS sum FROM test_arrayFold;
UPDATE test_arrayFold SET numbers = arrayFold(acc, x -> arrayPushBack(acc, x * 2), numbers, []) WHERE numbers[1] = 1;
SELECT arrayFold(acc, x -> (acc.1 + x, acc.2 + x), numbers, (0, 0)) FROM test_arrayFold;
